title: Hex Ways (1.20 fork)
description: Immersive Portals addon for Hex Casting
body:
# Hex Ways
An addon for Hex Casting that lets you create portals using Immersive Portals!

This is a fork of the original [Hex Ways](https://modrinth.com/mod/hex-ways) project, updated for 1.20.1, with a few additions and changes
<details>
<summary>Original description:</summary>

## Here at Hexxy Labs, we always strive for progress. And today we may serve that promise

Introducing the Hex Ways initiative! This is a new and great Hex Casting addon that adds in P.O.R.t.a.L.S

- Portable
- Optic
- Rifts
- that
- are
- Logical
- Science

We have instant item transportation, we have fast movements for people, but we don't have cool instant people transportation, so PORtaLS fix that, to make them is simple; just use the patterns we have discovered!

![Resize Portal and Remove Portal](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1383ef0c8e5a573ff4d827f262ca2290395cc4c7.png)
![Rotate Portal and Set Sides Portal](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7fa5f7bec02b0db28546775cab5a3621f619148a.png)

Just amazing, are they? What are you waiting for? Try it now today! `please note: to many PORTALS may cause reality to slowdown or halt`


</details>
